description: User can create an account using email and password.
User must verify email before first login.
System sends a unique verification link via email immediately after registration.
User can request to resend the verification link after 60 seconds.
Email must be unique.
Password length must be between 8 and 12 characters (inclusive).
Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one numeric digit, and one special character (e.g., @, #, $, %, ^, &, *).
Consecutive spaces in the password are forbidden.
Password cannot contain the user's explicit email prefix or username.
Verification link is valid for 24 hours.
Email format must contain '@' and a domain.
Password length must be between 8 and 12 characters (inclusive).
Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one numeric digit, and one special character.
Consecutive spaces in the password are forbidden.
Password cannot contain the user's explicit email prefix or username.
Email must be unique (no duplicate email allowed).
Leading/trailing spaces in the password are not trimmed.
Meaningful inline error messages must be displayed for duplicate email, invalid email format, and invalid password length.
Email sending service is required to send the verification link.
A mechanism to enforce the 60-second resend cooldown is required.
A mechanism to enforce the 24-hour verification link expiration is required.
